content.problemStatement:
Given an array of integers, determine if it can be divided into two subsets such that the sum of elements in both subsets is equal.


Input Format

First line contains TTT, the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains NNN, the size of array
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers




Output Format

For each test case, print "YES" if array can be partitioned into two equal sum subsets, "NO" otherwise.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the size of the array. The second line contains N space‑separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print "YES" if the array can be partitioned into two subsets with equal sum, otherwise print "NO". Each answer should be on a separate line.

solution.approach: The total sum of the array is computed first. If the sum is odd, an equal partition is impossible. Otherwise we need to know whether a subset with sum equal to half of the total exists. This is the classic Subset‑Sum problem which can be solved with a 1‑dimensional DP array: dp[s] is true if a subset with sum s can be formed using the processed elements. We initialise dp[0]=true and for each element v we update dp from high to low (for s from target down to v) so that each element is used at most once. After processing all numbers, dp[target] tells us whether the required partition exists.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N * target) per test case, where target = (total sum)/2 (at most 50 000 for the given constraints).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(target) auxiliary space for the DP array.

code.Java: import java.util.*;public class Main{private static boolean canPartition(int[] arr){int sum=0;for(int v:arr)sum+=v;if((sum&1)==1)return false;int target=sum/2;boolean[] dp=new boolean[target+1];dp[0]=true;for(int v:arr){for(int j=target;j>=v;--j){if(dp[j-v])dp[j]=true;}}return dp[target];}public static void main(String[] args){Scanner sc=new Scanner(System.in);sc.useDelimiter("\\s+|\\\\n");int T=sc.nextInt();StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();while(T-->0){int N=sc.nextInt();int[] arr=new int[N];for(int i=0;i<N;i++)arr[i]=sc.nextInt();sb.append(canPartition(arr)?"YES":"NO").append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
